messages.speaker: S
messages.text: Hello beautiful, my name is Captain Michael Brooks. I am currently deployed in a peacekeeping mission and your profile caught my attention immediately.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: The pleasure is entirely mine. Service to my country has been my life but it has also been lonely. Your smile in your photo gave me hope today.

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: thank you :) where are you deployed?

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: I cannot disclose specifics for security reasons but I can say it is a difficult region. Tell me about yourself, what brings you joy in life?

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: i like reading and gardening mostly

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: How wonderful, those are the marks of a thoughtful soul. I dream of one day having a quiet garden of my own, perhaps with someone special.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: My dear, our conversations have become the highlight of my days. I feel I can trust you with anything. Some matters here are best kept between us, away from prying family eyes who would not understand a love this pure.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: I have a serious matter I must share with you. I have accumulated savings during my deployment that I cannot access from this region. The military bureaucracy requires a civilian intermediary to release the funds.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: If you could help me, you would receive a portion as gratitude. But first, the release process requires a 1200 dollar administrative fee that must be paid by Friday to my logistics officer. After that the full amount will be wired to you.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: I know my love and I would never ask if there was another way. The window for this transfer closes Friday at 1700 hours UTC. Please send the fee via Western Union to the name I provide. I am counting on you.

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: Time is running short my dearest. Please confirm you can wire the fee today. Once we get past this hurdle our future is secure.
